changelog: Added 5 real benchmark rows: 3 real_cpu (CPU_LOW) + 2 real_colab_t4 (GPU_T4)
source_notes: Seed rows are synthetic baseline estimates. real_cpu rows measured on Intel i7 16GB RAM laptop using llama-cpp-python. real_colab_t4 rows measured on Google Colab free T4 (16GB VRAM) using autoawq 0.2.9 with fuse_layers=False.
hardware_notes: CPU_LOW = 8GB RAM laptop. GPU_T4 = Colab free tier Tesla T4 16GB VRAM. AWQ speed is lower than expected due to fuse_layers=False compatibility workaround for autoawq>=0.2.7.
